meta.name: [name]
meta.description: Anima 2B LoRA, 5090 FAST profile: the performance preset plus every verified speed lever. gradient_checkpointing OFF (a 2B model on 32GB does not need the ~30-40% recompute tax), latents cached to disk AND served from RAM (cache_latents + cache_latents_to_disk — disk-only re-reads every step), text embeds cached (hard-unloads the text encoder), full bf16 no quantization, batch 4, samples/saves stretched to 500. Fork speed keys: loss_sync_every 4 (loss display/log updates every 4 steps instead of syncing the GPU every step), ui_db_poll_seconds 2 (UI stop/save/sample buttons take up to 2s to be noticed). Training math is identical to the performance preset — same effective batch 4, author's recipe (rank 32, AdamW 2e-5, LLM adapter frozen). If 1024 x batch 4 OOMs without checkpointing, drop batch_size to 2 before re-enabling gradient_checkpointing. Not for shared-GPU use — take the background preset for that.
